name: Root user execution limit
description: Prevent default developer root logins and limit su usage.
security_objective: Protect Tizen OS devices against security vulnerabilities by enforcing proper root user execution limit settings.
business_justification: Fulfills regulatory requirements and mitigates risk vectors related to Tizen OS device operations.
remediation_guide: {"business_impact": "Risk of configuration drift on Root user execution limit. Attackers could exploit these unhardened parameters to launch privileges escalation actions.", "technical_impact": "Failed control allows unapproved subsystem bindings, breaking sandboxing isolation or inter-process communications.", "fix_steps": "Modify system properties. If automated, configure the parameter `root_login=disabled` in your config payload and deploy.", "config_example": "root_login=disabled", "validation_steps": "sdb shell tizen_check_security --control=UTSCF-ACP-03", "cost": "LOW", "estimated_time_hours": 6}
